Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters

Class AssociativeSimplification.CompSimplification

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters.AssociativeSimplification<Expression>
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters.AssociativeSimplification.ExpressionSimplification
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters.AssociativeSimplification.CompSimplification
Enclosing class:
AssociativeSimplification<T extends Formula<T>>
private static class AssociativeSimplification.CompSimplification extends AssociativeSimplification.ExpressionSimplification
This class handles operators Fcomp and Bcomp. In addition to neutral and determinant, we also process special cases:
  • sequences of the form (S ◁ id) ; (T ◁ id) which are simplified in (S ∩ T) ◁ id
  • sequences of the form (S ⩤ id) ; (T ⩤ id) which are simplified in (S ∪ T) ⩤ id
  • mixed sequences of the form (S ◁ id) ; (T ⩤ id) which are simplified in (S ∖ T) ◁ id
The utility class AssociativeSimplification.CompSimplification.CompAccumulator regroups the methods and data structures needed to perform the special simplifications described above.
